ayush_coverage.source_quote: AYUSH Treatment Expenses incurred for inpatient care treatment under Ayurveda, Yoga and Naturopathy, Unani, Siddha and Homeopathy systems of medicines is covered up to 100% of Sum Insured, during each policy year as specified in the policy schedule.

maternity_coverage.source_quote: Maternity Expenses (Code – Excl18): i. Medical treatment expenses traceable to childbirth (including complicated deliveries and caesarean sections incurred during hospitalization) except ectopic pregnancy;

organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: Organ Donor Expenses We will cover Inpatient Care Medical Expenses towards the donor for the harvesting of the organ donated provided that: (a) the organ donor is any person in accordance with the Transplantation of Human Organs Act, 1994

restoration_benefit.source_quote: Flexi Reload Benefit We will Reload Your Sum Insured, once in a Policy Year, up to 100% of Base Sum Insured, subject to the following:  the Base Sum Insured and No Claim Bonus (if any) is insufficient as a result of previous claims in that Policy Year;

domiciliary_treatment.source_quote: Domiciliary Hospitalization We will cover Medical Expenses for medical treatment taken at home if this continues for an uninterrupted period of 3 days and the condition for which treatment is taken would otherwise have necessitated Hospitalization

worldwide_emergency_cover.source_quote: F.2.9 Territorial Jurisdiction The geographical scope of this Policy applies to events within India. All admitted or payable claims shall be settled in India in Indian rupees.

preventive_health_checkup.source_quote: Annual Health Check-up We will arrange for a health check-up as per Your eligibility as defined in the Product Benefits Table provided that You or any Insured Person has requested for the same.

critical_illness_cover.source_quote: Second Opinion for Critical Illness We will provide You a second opinion from Medical Practitioner, if an Insured Person is diagnosed with the Critical Illness during the Policy Period.
